local.description: Primary local front door for Windows

netlify.notes: Deploy configured, health endpoint requires public proof

aws.description: Cloud mirror via AWS ECS Fargate

custom-domain.notes: Available as deployment lane when user configures domain

mirrorPolicy: Lantern OS has one canonical dashboard surface accessible through multiple front doors. Local is primary; cloud routes are mirrors and must not create separate dashboards. Cloud routes are verified only when /, /api/health, and /api/cloud-mirrors respond with expected payloads.

frontDoorValidation.candidate: Route is planned or architecturally possible; no operator evidence yet
frontDoorValidation.configured: Deployment settings, DNS, or TLS configuration exists but not fully proven live
frontDoorValidation.verified: Route responds to health checks and serves the canonical dashboard; operator has confirmed

awsRuntime.target: ECS Fargate or compatible AWS container service

cloudMirrors.name: Lantern OS Netlify Cloud
cloudMirrors.notes: Deploy active but public health check needs confirmation

retiredMirrors.name: Lantern OS Render
retiredMirrors.reason: Live route returned HTTP 404 for /, /api/health, and /demo-1000.html; operator requested Render be gutted.

retiredMirrors.name: HFF Render
retiredMirrors.reason: Removed from Lantern cloud mirror truth board to avoid onrender dependency split-brain.
